sc.political.s: FEC data 2020-2024: Samuel Adams founder Jim Koch and PAC donated ~$1.2M+ to Republican candidates and causes; 89% Republican allocation.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events documented; disclosure of Scope 1+2 emissions incomplete.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities documented in public record.
sc.charity.s: No public record of named charitable programs with quantified dollar amounts ≥1% of revenue.
sc.animals.s: Product category (beer) does not involve animal testing or animal-derived ingredients requiring certification.
sc.privacy.s: Not a data-intensive or privacy-relevant business model.
sc.execPay.s: No public CEO-to-median-worker ratio data available; privately held company.

charity.focus: Entrepreneurship support, community nonprofits, food/beverage industry development

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
